items.title: Can We Retire at 62 With $690K In A Roth IRA, $1,800 In Social Security, And No Mortgage — But $500 A Month In Out-of-Pocket Medical Costs?
items.description: Retiring at 62 sounds doable when the house is paid off and there's a solid nest egg waiting. But for one Florida couple, even a well-prepped plan feels like it's riding a tightrope. Together, they've saved $690,000 in a Roth IRA and expect $1,800 a month in combined Social Security benefits. Their mortgage is gone, which lifts a major weight. But their biggest concern heading into retirement isn't housing — it's healthcare. items.title: The 3 Best Quantum Computing Stocks to Buy for 2026
items.description: As quantum computing edges closer to real-world adoption, let's dig into three stocks to buy in 2026 that are best positioned to capitalize on the technology’s next wave of growth.

items.title: Allegiant to absorb Sun Country’s Amazon cargo business
items.description: Amazon will maintain, and grow, its cargo business with Sun Country Airlines even after the airline merges with Allegiant. The post Allegiant to absorb Sun Country’s Amazon cargo business appeared first on FreightWaves.

items.title: Trump says Microsoft will make changes to ensure consumers don't pay for power used in AI buildout
items.description: President Trump said in a social media post that Microsoft will "make major changes beginning this week" to make sure Americans don't see rising energy costs.
